nasb.text: Moreover, Uzziah had an army ready for battle, which entered combat by divisions according to the number of their muster, prepared by Jeiel the scribe and Maaseiah the official, under the direction of Hananiah, one of the king’s officers.

esv.text: Moreover, Uzziah had an army of soldiers, fit for war, in divisions according to the numbers in the muster made by Jeiel the secretary and Maaseiah the officer, under the direction of Hananiah, one of the king’s commanders.

cnv.text: 烏西雅又有善於作戰的軍隊，照著書記耶利和官長瑪西雅數點的數目，由王的一個將軍哈拿尼雅指揮，編隊上陣。

ccb.text: 乌西雅有支可以随时列队出战的军兵，归书记耶利和官长玛西雅召集，由王的将军哈拿尼雅统领。
